examples: He sat there passively, content to wait for his father to make the opening move.
Instead of working hard to create some chances, these people wait passively for the arrival of success.
It's assumed the viewer just passively watches it and then unthinkingly apes the attitudes and behavior on the show.
Clearly, Goldman was not just passively investing in a basket of green stocks, as PBW does.
Shoe-horned into their entertainment, they passively accept mini-lectures about detergents, frozen foods, hair coloring and beer.
